summary: Made a surgical exit polish to bridge chapter 1 more cleanly into chapter 2's next-day uphill spread of bridelight. The opening was left intact because its street-smell/place anchor is structurally distinct from chapter 2's noon-and-movement opening.
edits: Added a single exit beat that points Silas uphill by daylight if bridelight keeps answering.
Left the opening intact because it does not repeat the adjacent chapter's opening scaffold.
Checked for verbatim style-bible example lines; none appeared in the chapter.
